reviews.review_description:
Amazing game, the MR feel is perfect. A save game option would make it perfect.
I have found that sometimes I have to restart a level because of something that I did, that shouldn't have been possible, and cannot be undone. For instance in part 3 combining the 2 matching books made one disappear, no way to retrieve it :( Work on that guys.
If you like the concept of escape rooms, this is a must !

reviews.review_title: I wasn't sure at first, and then....Whoa
reviews.review_description: What an amazing game. Play it in a good sized room, and WOW!  it's such a realistic experience that I found myself stepping over items that I could have walked right through. Very well crafted puzzles that actually get easier after you kind of figure out how they think. Couple of very creepy experiences, and was straight up scared a few times. Bravo. Hope there is a sequel in the works.

Despite repeated requests from users for a save game feature, the developers are ignoring them.

I bought the game and only played it once because I couldn't finish the first level in about an hour, and adults have lives outside of gaming. Have to start the first level all over again? The whole thing? No way!

I'll update my review if the developers ever listen to us. It's a must!

reviews.review_title: Help! I can't start this game!
reviews.review_description: After I downloaded this and launched it, all I get is an error message saying I have moved out of my mapped space and to reload.  I have no mapped space yet and I can't see a way to get rid of this.  I tried removing and reloading the game - same result.  Help?
I am so sad this game is over and there’s not another one to start! Graphics were amazing story was amazing. I can’t say enough good things about this game! It’s everything I love in a puzzle game.

Ive never cared for MR and have always considered it more of a gimmick, than a game mechanic.  This game has changed my view.  As long as you have your playspace, house, apartment scanned completely; you're in for a treat. Brilliant implementation here.

The game itself has a lot of adult themes, so while its more cartoonist Graphics, its a very dark tone.  The puzzles are very challenging at times, but nothing too difficult (hint system available).

Cons- You must play each chapter in completion, since the save points are before each chapter. Depending on how good you are, they could take 15 minutes or 2 hours.
I only ran into one bug that caused me to start the chapter over.  This fixed it.

This game is worth your attention, if you like escape room style games. One with a fantastic mechanic.

I want more MR games like this

I’m new to the vr ar MR world so I find it so cool to bring the game into my world rather then playing in the game world. This puzzle game isn’t easy but boy it’s fun. A must play for the problem solver

Look, the premise is awesome. I really like the mixed reality approach here.

But the game is over-reliant on cheap jumpscares, the puzzles can be a bit obtuse, the physics constantly misbehaves sending objects flying across the room, and most importantly - there are no save files within a chapter. Which wouldn't be a problen if I didn't hit a softlock bug on a level exit door in the brain probe level. I ain't replaying this again, sorry.

reviews.review_title: Was suprised how good it was
reviews.review_description: If you like puzzles or escape rooms, this game is for you.  The mixed reality is perfect.  The puzzles are creative and the game was a wonderful surprise. I’m only through 4 puzzles but loved every one so far.  Hope they make another game like this or get add ons.  I’ll buy every add on for sure

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games I have played
reviews.review_description: WORTH THE BUY..... Not sure how much I have left of the game at the time of writing this but it really plays with your mind this game with its puzzles and what not and having to bring things in from a virtual world to place in your own play space in pass through to interact with them, I sometimes forget im on VR and pull the headset off and think where has that object gone or being careful not to trip over the torch when it's on the floor haha.

Absolutely loved this game, would definitely recommend it. Was challenging yet not so difficult I lost interest. I loved the mixed reality and effects. The story was engaging unravelling piece by piece. Definitely worth the money!

The only reason this gets 4 stars is because it is a bit glitchy. Otherwise, it is absolutely amazing and the most incredible experience using a Quest headset that I have found. Mixed reality is nothing that interested me until I played this. The price is ridiculously low for the many hours of playtime that I had. The puzzles are very tricky but I was able to work out most of them. It was frustrating to find that after a long time searching for an alternative soltion to a puzzle than one I had already tried, I would find I was right in the first place! It was simply a glitchy way I hadn't held or pressed something that meant it hadn't registered properly. Anyway, I didn't want the game to end. I think the door is open for a sequel and I would be quick to snap it up. I searched for more games by Playside Studios but didn't find anthing for the Quest that interested me. Hope they make more puzzle-type games soon.

reviews.review_title: PLEASE MAKE MORE OF THESE TYPE OF GAMES!
reviews.review_description:
I am only through the first two chapters but from the very get go this game gave me chills.

This game is so unique and EXACTLY what we need in MR.  The graphics look great (even if character models are a bit mediocre), the interactions and puzzles so far are hard but fair, and the story is amazing so far... very dark and adult.

PLEASE MAKE MORE OF THESE PLAYSIDE STUDIOS!!!   You have found your gold mine for sure in this, if you can throw out more of these games I would 100% play them all.

It seems like a fun game..  except mine is apparently broken, because I'm at a spot where there's nothing to do.  Checked a walkthrough, and they apparently have a cart sitting there that doesn't exist in my game.  Tried restarting the game, no luck, and they don't seem to have a discord or anything to ask questions.  So, I guess it's good if you're one of the lucky ones for whom it's functional?

reviews.review_title: Excellent game. Best showcase of mr
reviews.review_description:
This title should have more publicity. This is probably the best use of MR so far. 

It's exactly the right amount of spooky for your average gamer. Not too much but enough to maintain the tension.

Game is a bit challenging too which is good. Graphics are pretty good as well.

Excellent game

Get past the few glitches and keep going! Please remember that you can not save this in the middle of an episode, it will bring you back to the beginning of that episode. If you just take the headset off without stopping the game you will be able to get back into the same spot you left. 
This game has terrific puzzles for hours of fun with just the right amount of creepiness.

reviews.review_title: A MR and escape room masterpiece!
reviews.review_description:
It’s insane how good this game is, I loved every minute and didn’t want it to end. The puzzles are really hard in places but the occasional use of the hint system kept things moving. It’s really clever how they utilise the MR and is very engaging. I’m a big horror VR fan and there are some stand out moments that are really creepy that were so well done I just had to smile in appreciation. 
Reading other reviews sounds like some bugs at release but I didn’t have any on my playthrough.
Absolute bargain for a tenner, game is worth more imho. The icing on the cake was how well written and acted it was which made for a really engaging story and mystery. 
Can’t recommend highly enough. Message to devs: MORE PLEASE

One of the best games I've ever played in VR. The only thing I didn't like is that you cannot save the level mid way through, you have to finish it. Other than that, it's a unique experience with clever puzzles and an engaging story. Definitely recommend and hoping for a sequel!

reviews.review_title: One of the best experiences in VR / MR
reviews.review_description: As a VR early adopter from Oculus Rift CV1 days in 2016, through Valve Index, Reverb G2 and Quest 3, I have played most of the AAA titles, and Shattered is up there with the best of them. It reminds me of Wilsons Heart, a noire Oculus exclusive. Shattereds clever use of MR that slowly turns your real environment into the VR environment you first see  is quite unique. It's one of those titles that you don't want to end.

I loved this game. The story was great and thrilling. The graphics were spot on, and the puzzles, while difficult in some spots, were amazing. The mixed reality was amazing and made having a game on VR very worthwhile. Now the problem is I want more games like it but can't find them
 Please make more games like this one.

reviews.review_title: Developers - THIS is how you do it!!!
reviews.review_description: Man, this game is awesome.  Did things with VR and mixed reality that are mind blowing.  The story is immersive and the puzzles great.  This is THE gold standard for mixed reality.  Yeah, there are a few jump scares but nothing too bad.  Was truly sad to see it end.  Problem is no other mixed reality game can match it so it's all downhill after this game.  For now anyway.  Had no issues with saves but was forced to stop and plug in the headset now and then because I couldn't stop playing!

The game is very nice. There is some small problems with positioning the windows of the suggestions (which that seems to me was still improved but not solved altogether). For now 4 stars. I will give my final judgment when I complete it.

reviews.review_title: By Far the Best VR Game I’ve Played
reviews.review_description: My wife and I are both completely into this game… I love that it’s mixed reality and the puzzles, sounds and dialogue are all perfect… it looks and feels like you’re actually living out the entire game in your own home.  This is a 10 out of 10.

reviews.review_title: no save after chapters, abandoned by dev
reviews.review_description:
I love how what that game does in mixed reality and some of the puzzles are really nice so far.

But now I have to restart the second chapter again since I wanted to pause riddling after an hour or so. That's frustrating and totally unnecessary. I don't think that without saving I can motivate me enought to get through the game redoing over and over again what I already did.

Since it is out for some while now and still not fixed I think it won't ever be fixed. Very sad!

When are we getting more games like this? This is the answer for people who can't over VR dizziness during movement or teleportation. Fully immersive escape rooms/puzzles with a storyline; mystery, spine-tingling sets, jump scares, great graphics? Yes please. I'm in my 50s, got my first VR set and this was my first game and I think this set the bar way up high.
Yeah it's a good game, good ideas too but having the boundaries off and having no opinions whatsoever it's just not for me

This is easily one of the best (if not THE best) VR games currently on the market. I went from not touching my Quest 3 for months at a time, to not being able to wait to get home to play the next part of the game. It’s the kind of game that FINALLY makes you think “Wow, this could only happen in VR”, whereas most games seem to just be regular video games that they’ve bolted VR functionality onto. 

My only complaint is that it’s so good it’s basically thrown me into a depression because once I finished it, I can’t find any other game that’s nearly as fun or enjoyable. I’ve gone back to not touching my Quest 3.

reviews.review_title: Got past bugs enough to finish at last
reviews.review_description:
Wrote a previous review where I said I had to just stop playing, due to my room scan having shifted. I couldn't fix it at first, since I thought it was just a matter of making a new guardian. But I learned something new from playing this game, which can probably be applied to any future mixed reality games I may play: the room scan itself needs to be re-done, by going into settings, then environment setup, then space setup. The prior scan has to be cleared, then a new, detailed scan made. I know the devs said this in a reply as well, but somehow I didn't understand it, probably because I had never gone to settings before to do the original scan. 
Another bug that almost stopped me playing was in the clock chapter early on where the combination lockbox had to be used several times. Over time, the numbers in the lock would shift over, becoming inaccessible. The solution to this was not keeping the box in augmented reality for long. Putting it back into its virtual place when not needed kept the numbers aligned properly. 
No saves, but if you just tap the off button and then tap it on to re-start the game later, then all your stuff will still be there and you can continue where you left off (so don't exit the game first). I wish you could skip over the scenes before the next puzzle, in case you have to start a level over. And I wish players could control exactly where everything goes, without relying on the headset room scan. Too many times I had to try to find new positions for things when I couldn't reach stuff (like being just beyond my TV screen) and could not just move it toward the room a little, or push the main window back to the edge of the room again. I think making a detailed room scan with the headset in advance likely would have helped that a lot, though. 
Anyway, despite the issues I ran into, I definitely still recommend playing this game. It has a great story and some really fun puzzles. The scene with the water toward the end of the game is fantastic!

If you like Escape Rooms, buy this game. If you like mixed reality, buy this game. The immersion and problem solving is excellent alongside the storyline that develops as you solve the challenges in each room. This uses roomscale and has portals that allow you to bring items and objects into your living room and interact with. The only slight complaint is lack of save while in a room, but it does save progress between rooms and once you progress in a room its fairly easy to retrace your steps. A save feature would be nice though. Looking forward to more from the dev team in the future 😀 👏

I have been playing VR since a pretty long time (since 2020) and have played both on Quest 2 and PCVR to tens of games (both AAA and indie games). But I think it’s the 1st time that I am totally immersed inside a game ! I am pretty fan of puzzle and escape games (the room, Myst, Riven, …) but this one is very original and impressive.
Many thanks to the team and I hope that you will develop many other great games !!!
The game is great. Although the hint for the code in the vent is wrong. It should say: high, low, mid, high. The hint is the other way around and it pissed me off.

I loved this so much! Every day I couldn't wait to see what I would uncover next. My boyfriend who gets too disoriented and can't do virtual reality had alot of fun watching on our TV and helping along with clues when I would get stuck. This was one he was intrigued by and enjoyed also. I can't wait till the next one comes out. I was sad and missed it when it was over. Please come out with another soon!! Best virtual reality so for me
Never even seen this on a list of must play games. I have been blown away. I have only played around 40 mins but would already recommend if you like puzzle games.

UPDATE: I just finished the game and had to come and update my review. Before I mentioned this was the best MR game on Quest. It is also, easily, the best story on Quest. Gripped me all the way through. 

—————————

Brilliantly immersive with a gripping story and great visuals. I played until my battery and additional battery pack ran out. Best MR game on Quest. 

There are two things that devs could address to make this game even better.

1 - an option to save. Battery died, guessing I’m starting that level again.
2 - the mechanics around placing items from a scene into my room. It makes me place items outside my boundary and inside my walls etc which I then can’t get to. So spend a decent amount of time shuffling things around to make the game work. This should be simple and more intuitive.

By far the best example of MR I've experienced.
Good story telling and voice acting.
While the tools you'll find throughout are often the same, the way they keep things fresh with other puzzles and mechanisms is to be applauded.

It does have some minor jump scares, and has psychological and horror elements, but nothing too bad.

For the money, and if you like The Room VR, Ghost Town, House of Davinci, go for it.

Why not a 5 star?

The jank.  Several times the game developed a glitch, so the level couldn't be completed.
This happened to me twice on one level.
Coupled with the inability to save mid-level it gets frustrating.
Also on occasion where audio clues are being offered, if you then start listening to a different audio journal at the same time, you lose the clue and can't recover it.

Any other game with these annoyances would have been refunded or uninstalled.
However, I could see the potential and was hooked.

Glad I stuck with it, as I've been using VR since the beginning, as this is in my top 10 all time experiences.
There is no way to save your progress .. i was in the middle of my investigation in the first room and decided to take a break  .. then found out that i have to restart from the beginning 🙂💔
I love this Game so much! But why are there so many jumpscares?! I felt Like get a Heart attack in greyvale comman room. These jumpscares are horroble but the Game is amazing
I loved this game. I'm not usually a fan of mixed reality, but I thought this was really fun. I didn't have any issues with saves or any kind of bugs at all. It was a fun game. Interesting story.

reviews.review_title: Really great use of mixed reality
reviews.review_description: Great game with some really good teasers.  The puzzles are at a good level, and are satisfying when completed.  I love the ingenious way that MR is used, it really adds to the experience of the game.  Really recommend this.

Being new to the whole VR experience, I really didn’t know what to expect.  “Shattered” surpassed any expectations I could have had. The mixed reality was fantastic! Everything was so immersive and fun. The jump scares were just enough to keep me on my toes. I’m waiting for “Shattered II” 🤓

reviews.review_title: The reviews make me wanna try the game
reviews.review_description: Reviews came in clutch this might be a fun vr game I couldn’t find in 4 months
It is an awesome MR experience with an escape room theme. Please do yourself a favor and try this game. It would be great if an option to save was added by the developers. 10/10 would recommend.
Top notch interactive gaming this is a really great concept never experienced anything like it
The puzzles were really fun and the mixed reality is so cool. Creepy atmosphere. Not a scary game but every now and then there's a jump scare

This is such a great game. I love the mechanic of casting the scene into your wall and pulling things out of it to complete puzzles. My living room was often littered with items that I would squeeze around 😂
Nicely challenging puzzles but it would be so much better to be able to save mid episode rather than having to either complete an episode in one sitting or lose progress and start again. Highly recommend though. It's not often a game holds my attention long enough to complete it but this did, and with some spookiness too

So honestly this game is really good now the only issue I’m having is I have had to restart the level “Treatment” twice now because the character is stuck in compulsion and I already used an item for the problem but it looked like the game bugged twice and I even checked the walkthrough. But other than that this has been such a wonderful mixed reality experience

The uniqueness of the game mechanics and puzzling makes up for a rather over complicated plot and some rather clunky dialogue.

Had a bug or two along the way but nothing major and the controllers were overall natural.

A fun spooky adjacent time overall.

reviews.review_title: SUPER COOL MYSTERY GAME IN YOUR HOME
reviews.review_description:
this is the first full-fledged mixed reality campaign game I’ve played and it was awesome! It was basically like a single player escape room with a fully developed, dark and mysterious story, all of which takes place in your home (and some virtual portals). 

The story was well done, the voice acting was for the most part very good, the graphics were great (though I played with the quest optimizer so that made them even better) and the interactions were lots of fun. 

I also really like that there was a hint system integrated into the game in case you got stuck. That makes it a lot easier than having to scour the Internet for answers. Some of the puzzles were pretty tricky and I had to use it on occasion. 

I highly recommend this game. it was super fun and I hope to see many more games from this developer ￼!
This is the best MR game I have ever played. I enjoyed every minute of it!
I truly enjoyed this game from beginning to end.  It has become my favorite mixed reality game to date.  If you enjoy puzzle games, I do highly recommend this game.

Immersive, surreal, and magically mind bending are all descriptions I would use to describe one of the best games I’ve played on VR. THE BEST mixed reality experience. The mystery, character and story line development was top notch and kept me engaged in challenging puzzles.  The occasional jump scare to this psychological story line was perfectly timed on multiple occasions. I found myself laughing, deep in thought, jump scared, feeling like a genius or feeling dumb, placing  real life objects on fake desks, and overall joyefully immersed in this MR journey.  Please make more!!!

Why isn’t this game promoted on the front pages of this store? It has been the best MR experience I have had so far and could serve as a top example of how MR can be a mind bending story telling device. Story, graphics, gameplay, it’s just that good. Meta should push it much more. I hope there’s more to come of this caliber.

Was really enjoying until cold room case. Stuck (quite literally) in HELL-can bring furnace and conveyor forward but not the control panel. Have 2 hearts but can’t continue without 3rd. So frustrating, hope a dev can help. I have uninstalled and installed and problem continues. Please help!

As others have said, the in game save system needs to be improved, a level can take one to two hours and you need to complete that chapter to save, it’s not always possible to do this on battery and extended battery, I was panicking last night as I was at the end of story 2 with 5% battery left.
It was touch and go.

This is such a clever concept, once you work everything out it plays so well and I even played story one twice once o realised what to do.
So far the reviews are positive and it’s a game for anyone who love mixed reality.
This game was truly amazing! I loved every minute of it and every part of the interaction. Must play!

I’m absolutely thrilled about my experience so far with this game! I’ve only tackled two rooms, but it’s been an incredible adventure! The incorporation of mixed reality is simply mind-blowing! For me, this game is easily a 10-star experience! I’ve always loved puzzle games, but this one takes it to a whole new level with its captivating storyline and interactive elements. It’s truly impressive! The only thing I wish for is to have all the objects a bit closer so I can enjoy it from my seat due to my chronic pain. While I understand it is a lot to ask in this type of game, I believe it's possible, but it would require significant effort from the developers.
EDIT: I love this game and I won’t take away any stars for my frustration. However, it can be quite frustrating that you have to complete an entire “memory” game level to save your progress. If you quit the game before finishing the level, you have to start over. It’s challenging to complete a level if you don’t have the time or energy to do it in one sitting.

The game is pretty cool but what knocks it down to a 3 for me is the fact that the it doesn’t save your progress during chapters meaning if you can’t complete the “chapter” you have to start the chapter all over again. As the game progresses I’m finding the challenges getting harder to solve so if quit to get hints, or cause you run out of time, etc.. you have to start that chapter all over again and you’re talking 30-60 minutes of play  with some chapter. It takes the fun out of it and it’s what  keeping me from finishing the game.

reviews.review_title: tad rough to learn how to but..
reviews.review_description: When u learn,and u will very quickly learn how to transfer all things u r looking at to your home and start investigating. Giv it time caus in no time. u will b blown away!! I like sitting games but never played a game so good that I didn’t even notice I was having to!! And possibly thinking u could do sitting down also. But it’s a Great story great voice characters hard to understand and follow at first but when I say u don’t wanna stop until u see what happens in the end I’m being honest I did not at all wanna stop playing this til the end!!! Challenging and there were plenty of puzzles some hints r there when needed and some jumpy parts but omg so good and even mor exciting is the way it ended cause it left me wondering if maybe mor to come!!so plzzz tell me devs that’s something is n the works for mor to come now??!!! Either way very cool and don’t wanna spoil it especially brain surgery! I’m ending it with that it really didnt get the attention that it totally deserves plz go get this game if u like anything investigation and story wise caus it was awesome!!!😎 👍🏼🙌🏼

This is one of those unique pioneering media experiences that you won't come across too often in life.

It takes a bit of time to get into it and it's not for everyone, since it requires a decently sized room and does have some horror elements to it. The story is also dark.

But if you're good with that and escape rooms / puzzles are your thing ... and you're ok with looking things up every now and then ... then you absolutely have to bite your way through this. As it will leave you with one of the most memorable and unique gaming experiences that you can have at this point in time.

Good game but very finicky. I get it's trying to do lots of innovative things but some could have been easily improved. No save that I saw or heard about, so when your battery is dying its frustrating. I started out full battery. Also issue with the room scan, I wanted to change rooms and use the living room rather than the bedroom and couldn't figure out how to do it after many tries, reboots, going to the other room to try and scan, scanning on quest before launching etc it wouldn't let me change the room. Seems like easy fixes, but currently annoying.

It's a pretty cool game, there is a glitch that causes you to have to uninstall and reinstall the game and then start your room scan over from scratch. Otherwise it won't let you play it anymore. 
If you experience this glitch, just redo the scan completely and it'll work again without losing your progress.

fantastic use of mixed reality… Made my bedroom into a literal hellscape! Definitely not for young kids- got some pretty adult themes- brilliantly done. This is in my top 5 of all time, and that’s out of a ton of games/ apps..

It’s like the next generation of games like “The Room”

I truly am enjoying this game, super creative and a lot of fun, however for someone like myself that can only play meta for maybe 30 min at a time (a day), I really wish it would save where I left off. It's super frustrating having to start over every single time, which is defeating the purpose of me even playing. It really should save my game so I can resume it.

reviews.review_title: A bug stopped me from advancing further
reviews.review_description: Such an amazing game. It’s absolutely mind blowing. I cant complete it though. When I get to part 4, investigation. It starts but I’m missing the clock that is suppose to be there. I couldn’t figure it out then finally gave in and watched a walkthrough and sure enough everyone has a clock and an annoying ticking sound and when I start the level I don’t have the clock or the ticking. It’s super frustrating. I love this game so much and I’m highly upset that I won’t be able to continue playing it. Or I would give 5 stars easily. Hopefully they get the bugs worked out.

reviews.review_title: It’s as cool as it looks
reviews.review_description: If you like immersive psychological thrillers combined with the creative use of mixed reality and decent puzzles… this is a must play! This is just a taste of what the future holds. Incredible use of the Quest 3 Technology.
All in all, a good A/R experience with some seriously creepy moments.  Get it on sale and enjoy the ride

The game is really quite fun. I think the horror aspect was really oversold in most of promotional stuff(including paid promotional videos, be it free copy or actual cash, makes no difference). However, you do get something fun more like a traditional escape room game with a unique twist on the genre. The setting might be described as creepy, some stuff might be gore like but it's not a horror game it's got maybe 3 jump scares.

Each room is a unique setting and there are plenty of rooms. The hint system could probably have 1 more level for people who give up. Progress is saved per room so if you do have to quit mid room you lose a few minutes(not long since you know solutions). Overall it's a fun game with a story and that in itself is unique. Add to it that it's mixed reality and there aren't a lot of good games in that space. I played on a Q3 with higher resolution than stock(QGO) in 2 sessions.

reviews.review_title: Love the MR and creativeness of the game
reviews.review_description: I just started this game, but I'm already loving it! Sometimes it's difficult to find out how to do something, but it is a puzzle game too. I love the unique aspect of looking into virtual rooms and bringing them into your MR space. It's a very unique style of gameplay and I'm enjoying it so far!
Loved this! This was the 1st game I played on meta, and I couldn't stop till I completed it! It's definitely a time passer!

I’m withdrawing my previous rating. For a mystery puzzle solving game, HOW do you not have a save option?! It is absolutely tedious having to start from the beginning every single time. I now have to leave my quest running with the game when I want to stop. Preventing me from experiencing other many games and apps I enjoy using on a daily basis. Amazing concept and interaction but man the no save option is a deal breaker for me. I’m now rushing through the game instead of taking my time and enjoying it.
I love everything about this game ... except for the jump scares. They could have done with our that.
If you have quest 3 you should try this game.

This is one of the better narratives to a game that looks like an escape room but is actually a well developed story that unfolds as you assemble the pieces together. Great voice acting really helps ground the story and everything comes together to a satisfying conclusion to one of the first mixed reality story based game that I've played. Thank you for the great experience!

reviews.review_title: Shattered: A Top Shelf Escape Game
reviews.review_description: This game will flip your script and is the most amazing mixed reality game I have experienced. Play it.

reviews.review_title: Best mixed reality game on Quest!
reviews.review_description: Shattered is a mind-blowing mixed reality game. It's far scarier than I expected and the environments and sound are very well done. The room you are playing in quickly becomes full of objects and feels very real. The puzzles are pretty complex but very rewarding when you do solve them.

I will remember this horror escape room style game for many years. This game tops some of the best single player games I've played like Red Matter 1 and 2. The puzzles were super clever, the story was great and incredibly suspenseful and the MR was so engaging. 

There was still some jankiness to the MR at times w things jittering or shifting positions at times and tou definitely have to have a large amount of space to have lots of vr objects in your room..... but overall the game felt deep and  magical. 

There were about 3 or 4 experiences within this game that were breathtaking and I can't stop talking to my family about. Very well done devs!!! 🔥🔥🔥❤️❤️❤️🥂

Brood story and atmosphere. The mixed reality offers a unuige immerivness. The big issue I faced was each level can take a long time and you have to finish in one go or start over from the begining. Made me take a long time till I had time for a full session before picking it up again.

I really liked this game. The mixed reality, the atmosphere, the story and the puzzles are very good. Problem is that I reached a bug and can't progress.  I'm at this room where there is a clock and a box with 3 digits and 3 compartments that you need to open several times. The box digits just disappear at some point and you can no longer access or rotate them. Sent email to the developing studio, but no response

Got it, played until my battery died. Brilliant. 
This game is really special.  This is best use of Mixed Reality I have seen so far. 
Great story, great puzzles, great sound, great FX. This has it all.
Recommended.

reviews.review_title: Trying to get too cute IMO
reviews.review_description:
My guess is that this game was designed around a novel mechanic rather than the other way around. If it were in full VR, I think it would have a lot of promise and I'd be excited to play it, but the attempt to make it complex for the sake of complexity falls flat on its face for me. The "mirroring" concept seems so unnecessary - just put the story and escape room concept into full VR and you'd have a nice game here. Instead, the use of MR seems forced, and using my living room as the central hub of the game provides little immersion.

I also got stuck early on due to either a bug or incredibly unintuitive game design. After mirroring the key holder from down the hall and obtaining the two keys (with no keyholes anywhere in sight), I was forced to use a clue, which i hate doing in puzzle games. The key is for a foot locker, apparently...that didn't seem to exist. No foot locker in sight, anywhere. I looked around forever and couldn't find one.

I'll probably be returning this game.
